`r if (knitr::is_html_output()) '
# References and Additional Resources {-}
'`

To install R for free, go to the following home website: <https://cran.r-project.org/>.

To install RStudio for free, go to the following home website: <https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop>.

R base cheat sheet: <https://iqss.github.io/dss-workshops/R/Rintro/base-r-cheat-sheet.pdf>.

Book 'Hands-On Programming with R': <https://rstudio-education.github.io/hopr/>.
